name: Unbroken K2
short_description: Unbroken K2 is a Sports Simulation Roleplay Action Game with Kick Thai Boxing Elements. Create a newbie and become a Superstar, get the golden cup and fight your way to the top. Not only is it a sports game, but there are also more mini-games and surprises waiting for you.
detailed_description:
Unbroken K2 is a Sports Simulation Roleplay Action Game with Kick Thai Boxing Elements.
One of your Martial Arts Friend are missing you travel to the last place where he was seen. You will be quite surprised and humiliated there, you have to fight your way through all the opponents to get clarity, everything seems to be against you, good luck. Create a newbie and become a superstar, get the Champion Belt or the Golden cup and fight your way to the top.


  • Fighting Full contact Pro Kick Thai Boxing
  • Arcade Mode in the Map to get quick progress
  • create up to 20 characters(don't use the same name otherwise it will be deleted)
  • Change Game Speed In Pause Menu
  • It will be necessary to learn new Techniques
  • One key Combinations
  • Improve Statistics such as: Stamina, Strength etc.
  • Earn Money to challenge the next Opponent
  • Several Cities, Mini Games, Prison, Street fights, Credit Shark, Secret Places etc.
  • Special Power Hits and really Bad Damage on both side
  • Blocking, Counterattack and Dodge will always be your Friend
  • Perform training on different Locations
  • Earn 16 Special Skills and 11 One Key Combinations
  • Realistic Blood and Bruises
  • Train and get realistic Muscles as you progress
  • Funny Moments hidden or not hidden


You are a fighter, show that you are, and no one will laugh anymore.
Land your strikes before your Opponent get a chance to attack but keep your Eyes on your Stamina Bar and Skill Cooldown.
Special Skills and One Key Combinations cooldown are available and can be earned via Training or Secret Places.
Send your Opponent to the Ground with a Technically Knockout and you will be on the safe side.
